description: A designed square promotional graphic for ICE's Law Enforcement Support Center (LESC), in a high-contrast black-and-white style with selective blue and red accents. The right side shows a black-and-white photo of a man wearing eyeglasses and a telephone headset (a call-center/dispatch operator), in profile, looking toward a screen. The left/background is darkened and overlaid with faint blue binary-code digits ('001', '1', '0') evoking data and technology. Upper left carries the circular DHS seal and 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' in white. Mid-left white serif text reads 'Sharing timely & relevant information with law enforcement partners' with 'around the world.' highlighted in blue italics. The lower-left bears the large bold headline 'LAW ENFORCEMENT' (white) 'SUPPORT' (blue) 'CENTER' (white), with three red slashes and the URL 'ICE.gov/LESC.' The messaging promotes ICE's intelligence/data-sharing capabilities to law-enforcement partners; the audience is police agencies and the public, projecting a tech-forward, globally networked enforcement image.
notable_text: Sharing timely & relevant information with law enforcement partners around the world.; LAW ENFORCEMENT SUPPORT CENTER; ICE.gov/LESC
